C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\app_hero.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\app_hero.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\app_hero.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\app_hero.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o app_hero.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libapp_hero.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\app_hero.dir\linkLibs.rsp
